name: a5_input_validation
outcome_goal: An endpoint x input type x validator matrix is stored as decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix; every unvalidated endpoint is filed as a bug with signature input-validation::<endpoint>.
verify_command: bash -lc "psql postgresql://localhost:5432/praxis -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key='decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix' AND rationale LIKE '%endpoint_validation_matrix%'\" | rg '^1$'"

jobs.label: a5_input_validation
jobs.prompt: Build and persist the trust-boundary validation matrix. Targets: Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/rest.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/agent_sessions.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/api/handlers/_dispatch.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/operator.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/mcp/tools/workflow.py; Code&DBs/Workflow/contracts/domain.py. Enumerate every REST endpoint, agent-session endpoint, dispatch handler input, and MCP tool input. For each row record endpoint, input_type, validator/source contract, failure behavior, and gap status. Persist operator_decisions key decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix with rationale containing endpoint_validation_matrix and endpoint_count=<N>. File bugs for unvalidated entries with signature input-validation::<endpoint>. Do not add validators in this audit unless the fix is trivial and verifier-gated.
jobs.verify_command: bash -lc "psql postgresql://localhost:5432/praxis -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM operator_decisions WHERE decision_key='decision.2026-04-20.input-validation-matrix' AND rationale LIKE '%endpoint_validation_matrix%'\" | rg '^1$'"
